title: AZ State University PD - Data Sharing with LexisNexis

communications.subject: Arizona Public Records Law Request: AZ State University PD - Data Sharing with LexisNexis
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Arizona Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Your agency was identified by LexisNexis as being a customer of their BuyCrash product. The purpose of this request is to identify whether your agency also contributes records to LexisNexis's AVCC/PSDEX programs. To answer that question, we are requesting the following documents:

1) All contracts, agreements, info sharing MOUs, Schedule A documents, XML Addenda, and data-sharing agreements with LexisNexis Risk Solutions, RELX Inc., or any entity related to Accurint, the Accurint Virtual Crime Center (AVCC), or the Public Safety Data Exchange (PSDEX).

If there is a data sharing/contribution agreement beyond just the BuyCrash data product, we are also requesting: 
2)  Data scope records: Any records identifying which data fields, record categories, or report types are transmitted to LexisNexis under the data contribution agreement — specifically whether victim records, witness records, Title IX-adjacent incident reports, or records incorporating student identification information are included in the data feed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal
